title: Redone Endermans X Fresh Animations
description: an addon for fresh animations that make the redone endermans texture the texture of the enderman
body:
##  About
**a resource pack that gives endermans a new look data**

## Terms Of Use
- **Follow the tos of fresh animations**
- **Feel free to moodify the pack as much as you like**
- **Don't claim the pack as your own**
- **Don't use unmodified assets of this pack unless they are for personal use**

- **if you use the pack in a video would appriciate it if you inclue the pack's name in the decription or mention the name**

## Reporting Problems
**If you have any problems join my [discord server](https://discord.gg/kMuxe42c9j) or tell me in my discord dm @_hellay**
